title: Scrub Daddy Scrub Mommy Washing Up Sponge - Dual Sided Scrubbing Non Scratch Scourers, Smiley Face Sponges for Cleaning Kitchen & Bathroom, Dish Scrubber, FlexTexture Home Products, Pink Single Pack
features: Washing Up Sponge Scrubber - Scrub Mommy smiley face sponges for cleaning are two-sided cleaning sponges and non scratch scourers. The FlexTexture side scrubs off debris, then flip it and use the ResoFoam side to soak up liquids and wipe the surface dry

FlexTexture Sponge Scourers - The FlexTexture side is firm in cold water for a tough scrubbing sponge or soft in warm water for a light cleaning dish sponge. In cold water she's as strong as any other kitchen scrubber and can remove stubborn debris without the need for harsh chemicals

Absorbent Washing Up Sponges - The ResoFoam side is 6x more absorbent than other leading kitchen sponges and has been designed with suds-generating properties so you can achieve a rich lather with these sponges washing up essentials. They're even odor and stain resistant, the ideal kitchen or bathroom scrubber for home cleaning

Scratch Free Dish Scrubber - This scourers sponge combo is safe to use on over 20 different surfaces such as glass, marble, porcelain, stainless steel and many more. An innovative scourers non scratch design for use in your house cleaning kit on anything from dinner dishes to a duster sponge for the garden fence

360 Degree Scrub Sponge - A household kitchen sponge with an ergonomic shape. Her eyes hold onto you so you’ll never run into a hard-to-reach place or dish again. Her circular shape lets you clean the sides and bottom of containers at the same time - multipurpose magic sponges for cleaning on any occasion
description: From the manufacturer Her FlexTexture Side becomes firm in cold water to deliver added scrubbing power. In warm water it softens, becoming better suited for light cleaning jobs. More than a happy face Scrub Mommy’s shape is ergonomic and fully functional. Use her eyes to clean 360 degrees and reach the bottom of tall glasses, coffee pots and sauce pans. Her ResoFoam Side is super absorbent and generates tons of suds, in addition to being odor and stain resistant. Scratch-free scrubbing on over a dozen different household surfaces including non-stick, crystal, granite, travertine and oil rubbed bronze.
